_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Business modelling involves visualising, analysing and communicating current and future business situations and how business components influence each other.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business stakeholders in terms of business impact rather than technical metrics.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-005 (AB, cosine: 0.495), RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.484).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.457). Shared vocabulary: [business, communicating]. DDaT-only terms [analysing, components, current, future, influence, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [findings, impact, limitations, metrics, model, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.861, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.3%). "Business modelling involves visualising, analysing and communicating current and" and "Skill in communicating model findings and limitations to non-technical business" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.552 > STS 0.457 (gap +0.095). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [business, communicating] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [business, communicating]. DDaT-only: [analysing, components, current, future, influence, involves]. WIDAI-only: [findings, impact, limitations, metrics, model, non].
